mapper.select: SELECT IC.CTKEY , IC.OWKEY , IC.ICKEY , IC.ICNAME , IC.ICGRKEY , IC.ICGRTYPE , IC.ICUTKEY , IC.UOM , IC.WIDTH , IC.LENGTH , IC.HEIGHT , IC.WEIGHT , IC.VOLUME , IC.BRANDCODE , IC.ICST_HDKEY , IC.TO_LCKEY , IC.TO_ARKEY , IC.ABC , IC.SAFE_INVQTY , IC.CLOSDATE , IC.SHELFLIFEINDICATOR , IC.SHELFLIFE , IC.SHELFDAY , IC.SHELFLIFECODETYPE , IC.UDF1 , IC.UDF2 , IC.UDF3 , IC.UDF4 , IC.UDF5 , IC.COSTPRICE , IC.SALEPRICE , IC.LOGGRPCD , IC.CTGKEY , COALESCE(IC.WRHOUS_SE, CTG3.WRHOUS_SE) AS WRHOUS_SE , COALESCE(IC.BOL_WRHOUS_SE, CTG3.BOL_WRHOUS_SE) AS BOL_WRHOUS_SE , IC.INSERTDATE , IC.INSERTURKEY , IC.UPDATEDATE , IC.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_IC IC , TWORK_MST_CTG CTG1 , TWORK_MST_CTG CTG2 , TWORK_MST_CTG CTG3 WHERE IC.CTKEY = CTG1.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = CTG1.OWKEY AND IC.CTGKEY = CTG1.CTGKEY AND CTG1.CTGLEVEL = '3' AND CTG1.CTKEY = CTG2.CTKEY AND CTG1.OWKEY = CTG2.OWKEY AND CTG1.UPPERCTGKEY = CTG2.CTGKEY AND CTG2.CTGLEVEL = '2' AND CTG2.CTKEY = CTG3.CTKEY AND CTG2.OWKEY = CTG3.OWKEY AND CTG2.UPPERCTGKEY = CTG3.CTGKEY AND CTG3.CTGLEVEL = '1' AND IC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IC.ICKEY = #{ickey}
